What We Do

Everything Your Farm Needs

From routine servicing to full rebuilds — in our Foxton workshop or on your property.

Workshop Repairs

Full diagnostics, maintenance and repairs at our large Foxton workshop. John Deere specialists, all brands serviced.

Learn more →

Mobile Service

5 fully equipped trucks on the road. We come to your farm across Manawatu and Central Districts — your schedule.

Learn more →

Tractor Transport

Own transporter truck for tractor recovery and equipment relocation. Competitive rates — call for a quote.

Learn more →

Parts & Accessories

Large showroom with parts, oils, filters and Fieldmaster accessories. Overnight sourcing for all major brands.

Learn more →

Sales

Second-hand tractors and machinery, plus new Fieldmaster equipment as authorised dealer. Stock changes regularly.

Learn more →

Hire

Tractors and implements available for short-term hire. Call to check availability and rates.

Enquire →
5
Mobile Trucks
Why P&T Tractors

The Region's Trusted
Tractor Specialists

01

John Deere Specialists

Factory-trained on John Deere. Proper diagnostics, proper parts, proper repairs — not guesswork.

02

Fieldmaster Authorised Agent

Exclusive access to parts and new machinery. Not in stock? It's here overnight.

03

We Come to You

Five mobile trucks across Manawatu and Central Districts. Breakdowns don't wait — neither do we.

04

Locally Owned, Community Trusted

We live and work in Foxton. Straight pricing, quality repairs, honest advice.

Call Us: 06 363 7044

Need a Tractor Sorted?

Call us, send an enquiry, or come in to 65 Johnston St, Foxton.
